text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is training for the next race, the
Osaka Hai, when Symboli Rudolf approaches her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After praising Maruzensky for setting a great
example for the younger students, she expresses
her genuine wish to compete with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When "Emperor" Symboli Rudolf asks to face her,
Maruzensky is filled with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Symboli Rudolf enters the
Osaka Hai to square off against Maruzensky.
